Package glide.managers

Class CommandManager

  • java.lang.Object
    • glide.managers.CommandManager
  • public class CommandManager
extends java.lang.Object
    CommandManager that submits command requests directly to the Rust glide-core. Handles command serialization, routing, and response processing for all client operations.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      static interface  CommandManager.ClusterScanCursorDetail
      Internal interface for exposing implementation details about a ClusterScanCursor.

      Constructors
